CustomField.inlineHelpText: Starter JSON for ConfigurationJson__c that admins can load with one click. Authored as a top-level map keyed by source SObject API name (LogEntry__c, Log__c, etc.), each pointing at the suggested configuration for a rule targeting that SObject. A "*" key acts as the fallback for any SObject not spelled out. Example: {"LogEntry__c": {"sourceFields": [...]}, "*": {"sourceFields": ["Name"]}}.
CustomField.label: Suggested Configuration JSON
